title: [codereview-pass3-1] coap_dtn.c: lichen_coap_respond added with OSCORE path; mutex now protects both rate limit and DTN buffer ops preventing races; zcbor recipient parse integrated for LCI
close_reason: Implemented lichen_coap_respond OSCORE support, consolidated mutex for rate limit + DTN buffer (no races), added zcbor recipient parsing in deaddrop_post for LCI; removed duplicate coap_respond; verified no compile errors in context of codereview pass3
